title: blackstonia citrina
intro: Blackstonia citrina, also known as yellow and green-eyed violet, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blackstonia citrina include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Blackstonia citrina can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, and is also used in homeopathic and aromatherapy practices to promote overall well-being.
